description: Implement granular consent mechanisms that allow users to opt-in to specific data tracking features, ensuring compliance with GDPR and addressing user concerns.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the consent mechanisms are updated WHEN users access their settings THEN they can opt-in to specific data tracking features.

description: Prepare for a full GDPR compliance audit by addressing key concerns such as lawful basis for processing, consent mechanisms, data retention policies, and the right to erasure implementation.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the compliance audit is scheduled WHEN the audit team reviews the system THEN all GDPR concerns are addressed satisfactorily.

description: Implement a data ingestion pipeline that captures browsing history, click patterns, scroll depth, and time-on-page metrics for each authenticated user. The pipeline must handle at minimum 50k events/second at peak and store raw events with full user identifiers for profile enrichment downstream.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is authenticated WHEN they browse content THEN the system captures their browsing history and click patterns in real-time.

description: Build a recommendation engine that uses accumulated user profile data to serve personalized content suggestions. The model should incorporate collaborative filtering and content-based approaches, targeting a 20% improvement in content CTR within 60 days.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user profile data is available WHEN the recommendation engine is invoked THEN it returns personalized content suggestions with a target CTR improvement of 20%.

description: Redesign privacy settings to make them more intuitive and user-friendly, addressing user frustrations and enhancing engagement with privacy controls.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new privacy settings are implemented WHEN users access their privacy controls THEN they can easily navigate and manage their preferences.

description: Provide users with options to opt-out of cross-device tracking to address privacy concerns, particularly for enterprise users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the opt-out options are available WHEN users access their privacy settings THEN they can opt-out of cross-device tracking.

description: Link user activity across mobile app and web browser sessions using deterministic and probabilistic matching to enable a unified user profile regardless of device.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is logged in on multiple devices WHEN they interact with content THEN their activity is linked to a single user profile.

description: Build a user-facing dashboard that displays collected behavioral data, inferred interests, content categories, and engagement patterns. Include toggles to opt out of specific tracking categories to enhance transparency.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the dashboard WHEN they view their data THEN they can see their inferred interests and opt out of tracking categories.

description: Implement a mechanism for collecting user feedback on the recommendation engine and privacy settings to inform future iterations and improvements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback mechanism is live WHEN users interact with the recommendation engine THEN they can submit feedback easily.

description: Create an API and batch export system that shares anonymized user profile segments with advertising partners, ensuring that individual re-identification is not possible.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an advertiser requests user segments WHEN the API is called THEN the system returns anonymized cohort-level data without individual identifiers.

description: Establish monitoring and alerting systems to ensure ongoing compliance with GDPR and to quickly address any potential violations.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is in place WHEN a compliance issue arises THEN alerts are generated for immediate action.
